video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic, Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop, warm wood textures. Sora Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron, steadies a dented shield on a wooden workbench. Sora Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped travel jacket, carefully guides a safe repair tool over the metal surface. Soft ambient forge light, cooperative posture, high-quality anime art style, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop. Sora Emberlane taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Sora Mistfell maintains a firm, steady grip on the workbench. The two characters exchange a friendly look of accomplishment. Consistent warm lighting, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on a fantasy craft activity. No sexual content, no violence, no text, and no watermarks are present.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Sora Mistfell and Sora Emberlane cooperate to resolve the forge supply shortage by using the scout's iron ingot for urgent gear repairs.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative forge work builds mutual professional respect.
Reliable gear maintenance fosters appreciation for the crafter's skill.
